mapper.sql: room_id, room_code, room_name, description, max_members, current_members, owner_id, status, expire_time, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM room WHERE room_code = #{roomCode} AND status = 0

SELECT
FROM room WHERE expire_time < #{currentTime} AND status = 0 ORDER BY expire_time ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM room WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
